prompt_text:
### Instruction

List public databases that contain ATAC-seq data from human Type 2 Diabetes (T2D) samples.

### Constraints

* Include only databases/repositories (NOT individual datasets)
* Only ATAC-seq (exclude RNA-seq, ChIP-seq, etc.)
* Must be publicly accessible
* Human data only
* Exclude irrelevant or generic databases without clear T2D ATAC-seq evidence

### Output Format

| Database Name | URL | Description | Evidence of T2D relevance |
description: Nih repository for functional genomics data including atac-seq
evidence_access_type: Contains multiple ATAC-seq studies on T2D pancreatic islets beta cells and adipose tissue

prompt_text: List public databases that contain ATAC-seq data from human Type 2 Diabetes (T2D) samples.
description: Encyclopedia of dna elements with chromatin accessibility data
evidence_access_type: Includes human tissue ATAC-seq datasets some T2D-relevant pancreatic samples available

prompt_text: List public databases that contain ATAC-seq data from human Type 2 Diabetes (T2D) samples.
description: Chip-seq/atac-seq database for transcription factor and chromatin accessibility
evidence_access_type: Hosts human ATAC-seq data includes studies on diabetes-relevant cell types

You are a bioinformatics expert specializing in epigenomics data resources.

### Task

Identify databases that contain ATAC-seq data from:

* Human pancreatic islets
* Human beta cells
* Type 2 Diabetes (T2D) donors

### Requirements

* Include only well-known, reliable databases
* Avoid uncertain or low-confidence resources

### Output

* URL:
* Sample Type:
* Access Method (API / FTP / download):
